_doc: вҳ…8 autoformalization demo (docs/13 В§дә”В·дәҢ). SAME loop as sum-bound.loop.json but with NO `invariant` key вҖ” so `prove` tries to SYNTHESIZE one: the LLM proposes candidate invariant clauses, z3 (via proveLoop) checks every one, and a candidate is accepted ONLY if all 3 VCs discharge (generate-and-check; failures + counterexamples are fed back for bounded refinement). Offline (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY/OPENAI_API_KEY/MCP-sampling) it degrades honestly to `needs-llm` with the structured prompt вҖ” never a fabricated invariant. The invariant z3 should find here is `0 <= i && i <= n && sum == i`.
name: bounded-accumulator-synth
